name: Ledger
description: Fine ruled lines with one bold rule sliding to a new row on reseed.

code.style: --rule: ( @random(${shapeFrequency}) { background: repeating-linear-gradient(0deg, @p(var(--color1), var(--color2), var(--color3), var(--color4), var(--color5)) 0 5%, var(--color0) 5% 28%); :after { content: ''; position: absolute; left: 0; top: @pick(22%, 48%, 72%); width: 100%; height: 12%; background: @p(var(--color1), var(--color2), var(--color3), var(--color4), var(--color5)); -webkit-transition: ease 450ms; transition: ease 450ms; } } -webkit-transition: ease 450ms; transition: ease 450ms; );
code.doodle: :doodle { @grid: ${grid}; @size: ${width} ${height}; overflow:hidden; text-align:center; box-sizing:border-box } :container { background: var(--color0); overflow:hidden; }
